user.title: Add Docker Container
user.description: Enter the details for the remote Docker container.

data_description.name: A friendly display name for this container in Home Assistant (e.g. My Web Server).
data_description.service: The exact container name on the remote host, as shown by `docker ps` (e.g. my_web_server).
data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the remote machine running Docker.
data_description.username: SSH username used to connect to the remote host.
data_description.password: SSH password. Leave empty if authenticating with a key file.
data_description.key_file: Absolute path to the SSH private key file on the Home Assistant machine. Leave empty if authenticating with a password.
data_description.check_known_hosts: Verify the remote host against a known_hosts file before connecting.
data_description.known_hosts: Absolute path to the SSH known_hosts file on the Home Assistant machine.
data_description.docker_command: Docker executable to use on the remote host (e.g. `docker` or `sudo docker`).
data_description.check_for_updates: Periodically check whether a newer image is available for this container.
data_description.auto_update: Automatically recreate the container when a newer image is available.

error.password_or_key_file_required: Either password or key file must be provided.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the remote host.
error.docker_command_failed: The docker command failed. Check the docker command and permissions.
error.host_key_not_verifiable: The host key could not be verified.
error.login_failed: SSH login failed. Check username and password/key file.
error.connection_timed_out: Connection to the host timed out.
error.service_not_found: The service name was not found on the remote host. Check the name and make sure the container exists.

abort.already_configured: This docker container on this host is already configured.
abort.already_in_progress: A setup flow for this docker container on this host is already in progress.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the remote machine running Docker.
data_description.username: SSH username used to connect to the remote host.
data_description.password: SSH password. Leave empty if authenticating with a key file.
data_description.key_file: Absolute path to the SSH private key file on the Home Assistant machine. Leave empty if authenticating with a password.
data_description.check_known_hosts: Verify the remote host against a known_hosts file before connecting.
data_description.known_hosts: Absolute path to the SSH known_hosts file on the Home Assistant machine.
data_description.docker_command: Docker executable to use on the remote host (e.g. `docker` or `sudo docker`).
data_description.check_for_updates: Periodically check whether a newer image is available for this container.
data_description.auto_update: Automatically recreate the container when a newer image is available.

error.password_or_key_file_required: Either password or key file must be provided.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the remote host.
error.docker_command_failed: The docker command failed. Check the docker command and permissions.
error.host_key_not_verifiable: The host key could not be verified.
error.login_failed: SSH login failed. Check username and password/key file.

create.name: Create Docker Container
create.description: Creates a docker container using the docker_create executable on the remote host.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity ID of the docker container sensor.

restart.name: Restart Docker Container
restart.description: Restarts a docker container on the remote host.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity ID of the docker container sensor.

stop.name: Stop Docker Container
stop.description: Stops a docker container on the remote host.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity ID of the docker container sensor.

remove.name: Remove Docker Container
remove.description: Stops and removes a docker container on the remote host.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity ID of the docker container sensor.

refresh.name: Refresh Docker Container Info
refresh.description: Refreshes the sensor state for a docker container on the remote host.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity ID of the docker container sensor.

get_logs.name: Get Docker Container Logs
get_logs.description: Fetches the recent logs of a docker container on the remote host.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity ID of the docker container sensor.

execute_command.name: Execute Command in Docker Container
execute_command.description: Executes an arbitrary command inside the docker container on the remote host and returns the output.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity ID of the docker container sensor.

command.name: Command
command.description: The command to execute inside the docker container.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum number of seconds to wait for the command to complete. Defaults to 60.

entity_not_found.message: Could not find the specified entity.

docker_create_not_found.message: The docker_create executable was not found on the remote host.
